description.en: Adds a handler callback function that will be run after the navigation has committed, as though it has been added toNavigateEvent.intercept()using theoptions.handlerargument.

description.en: Returns aNavigationActivationobject containing information about the most recent cross-document navigation, which "activated" this Document.
